ddls:
CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator (environmental or economic) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (numeric or categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (city, state, country) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator the data point belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data point belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data point was recorded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "economic_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the economic indicator */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Industry sector associated with the economic indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection for the economic indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data_points" (
  "economic_data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data point */,
  "economic_indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator the data point belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data point belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the economic data point was recorded */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the economic data point */,
  "revision_status" TEXT /* Revision status of the economic data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_points_economic_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("economic_indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("economic_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_points_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the indicator */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_regions" (
  "indicator_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator-region pair */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_regions_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_values" (
  "data_point_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point value */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Actual value of the data point */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data point value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_values_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)
